<style>

*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{font-family:"Microsoft YaHei","SimHei",Arial,sans-serif;background:#f0f2f5;color:#202124;font-size:13px;line-height:1.65}
.page-wrap{max-width:980px;margin:0 auto;padding:16px 12px 40px}
.sr-hdr{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d47a1,#1565c0 60%,#1976d2);color:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:22px 26px 18px;margin-bottom:20px}
.sr-hdr h1{font-size:24px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;margin-bottom:4px}
.sr-hdr .sub{font-size:12px;color:#bbdefb;margin-bottom:12px}
.sr-price-panel{display:inline-block;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 18px;margin-right:14px;vertical-align:top}
.sr-big-price{font-size:36px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;line-height:1}
.sr-price-chg{font-size:14px;color:#ffcdd2;margin-top:4px}
.sr-tag{display:inline-block;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);padding:4px 11px;border-radius:16px;font-size:11px;color:#fff;margin:2px 4px 2px 0}
.sr-sec{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;border-left:4px solid #1a73e8;padding-left:10px;margin:22px 0 12px;color:#202124}
.sr-card{background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:18px 20px;border:1px solid #dadce0;margin-bottom:16px}
.sr-card h2{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;border-bottom:2px solid #1a73e8;padding-bottom:6px;margin-bottom:12px;color:#202124}
.sr-mr{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #f1f3f4}
.sr-mr:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.sr-ml{font-size:11px;color:#5f6368}
.sr-mv{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#202124;font-family:monospace}
.sr-up{color:#ea4335}.sr-dn{color:#34a853}
.sr-hbox{border-radius:8px;padding:12px 16px;margin:10px 0;font-size:12px;line-height:1.9}
.sr-hbox-blue{background:#e3f2fd;border-left:4px solid #1a73e8}
.sr-news-item{padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #f1f3f4}
.sr-news-item:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.sr-news-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#202124}
.sr-news-meta{font-size:10px;color:#5f6368;margin-top:2px}
.sr-code-badge{background:#e3f2fd;color:#1a237e;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:3px;font-size:10px;font-family:monospace}
.sr-sc-badge{display:inline-block;color:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:3px 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;min-width:34px;text-align:center}
.sr-ring-wrap{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:76px;height:76px;border-radius:50%;border:5px solid #ccc;text-align:center}
.sr-ring-good{border-color:#34a853;color:#34a853}
.sr-ring-warn{border-color:#f57c00;color:#f57c00}
.sr-ring-bad{border-color:#ea4335;color:#ea4335}
.sr-rec-buy{background:#e8f5e9;border:2px solid #43a047;border-radius:10px;padding:16px 20px;margin-top:8px}
.sr-rec-watch{background:#fff3e0;border:2px solid #ffa726;border-radius:10px;padding:16px 20px;margin-top:8px}
.sr-rec-sell{background:#fce8e6;border:2px solid #ef5350;border-radius:10px;padding:16px 20px;margin-top:8px}
.grid3{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-bottom:16px}
.grid4{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px}
.sr-kv-card{background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;border:1px solid #e0e0e0;text-align:center}
.sr-kv-label{font-size:10px;color:#9e9e9e;margin-bottom:4px}
.sr-kv-val{font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:#202124}
.sr-kv-sub{font-size:10px;color:#9e9e9e;margin-top:2px}
.sr-pt-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-top:14px}
.sr-pt-cell{background:#fff;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #dadce0;text-align:center}
.sr-pt-label{font-size:10px;color:#5f6368;margin-bottom:6px;display:block}
.sr-pt-price{font-size:18px;font-weight:800;display:block}
.sr-pt-hint{font-size:9px;color:#9e9e9e;margin-top:4px;display:block}
.sr-chip-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;background:#fffde7;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;border:1px solid #fff176;margin-bottom:14px}
.sr-chip-cell{text-align:center}
.sr-chip-lbl{font-size:10px;color:#8d6e63;display:block}
.sr-chip-val{font-size:14px;font-weight:800;display:block}
.sr-kline-img{width:100%;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid #dadce0;display:block;margin-bottom:12px}
.sr-kline-empty{text-align:center;color:#aaa;padding:24px;background:#fafafa;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:12px}
.fund-bar{height:10px;background:#f1f3f4;border-radius:5px;overflow:hidden;margin:4px 0 2px}
.fund-bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:5px}
.sr-risk-box{background:#fff8e1;border-radius:8px;padding:12px 15px;margin-top:16px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.9;border-left:4px solid #fbbc04}
.sr-footer{text-align:center;font-size:10px;color:#aaa;padding:16px 0 6px}
.sr-fin-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px}
.sr-fin-table th{background:#f8f9fa;padding:6px 8px;text-align:left;font-weight:600;color:#5f6368;white-space:nowrap}
.sr-fin-table td{padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #f1f3f4;white-space:nowrap}
.back-link{display:inline-block;margin-bottom:16px;padding:6px 14px;background:#e3f2fd;color:#1565c0;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600}
.sr-tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px}
.sr-tbl th{background:#f1f3f4;padding:10px 8px;text-align:center;font-weight:700;color:#5f6368}
.sr-tbl td{padding:9px 8px;text-align:center;border-bottom:1px solid #f1f3f4;vertical-align:middle}
.sr-tbl tr:hover td{background:#f8f9fa}
.sr-tbl tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
.mkt-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px}
.mkt-card{background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:14px 16px;border:1px solid #dadce0;text-align:center}
.mkt-name{font-size:11px;color:#9e9e9e;margin-bottom:6px}
.mkt-price{font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:#202124}
.mkt-chg{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-top:4px}
.top3-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;margin-bottom:20px}
.top3-card{background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:16px 18px;border:2px solid #1a73e8}
.detail-link{display:inline-block;padding:4px 10px;background:#e3f2fd;color:#1565c0;border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none}

</style>

<div class="sr-card"><div class="sr-hbox sr-hbox-blue" style="margin:0"><b>行情概况</b>：今日下跌 <b style='color:#388e3c'>-0.32%</b>，5日+0.93%/20日+4.11%/60日-0.50%，当前价4093，处于52周高位区。<br><b>技术面</b>：价格站上MA20(3986)，均线呈多头排列；RSI(6)=72（偏强），KDJ-J=94，MACD金叉向上。<br><b>估值</b>：PE(TTM)=17.8（合理）。</div></div>
